### Getting Started

### Install and Launch R Packages


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)
```
:::


### Import Data


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
exam_data <- read_csv("data/Exam_data.csv")
```
:::


### Simple Bar Chart


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
hist(exam_data$MATHS)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


### ggplot2</br>

-   **Data**: The dataset being plotted.

-   **Aesthetics** take attributes of the data and use them to influence visual characteristics, such as position, colours, size, shape, or transparency.

-   **Geometrics**: The visual elements used for our data, such as point, bar or line.

-   **Facets** split the data into subsets to create multiple variations of the same graph (paneling, multiple plots).

-   **Statistics**, statiscal transformations that summarise data (e.g. mean, confidence intervals).

-   **Coordinate systems** define the plane on which data are mapped on the graphic.

-   **Themes** modify all non-data components of a plot, such as main title, sub-title, y-aixs title, or legend background.

#### geom_bar


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data = exam_data, 
       aes(x = RACE)) +
    geom_bar()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


#### geom_dotplot


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data=exam_data, 
       aes(x = MATHS)) +
  geom_dotplot(dotsize = 0.5)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data=exam_data, 
       aes(x = MATHS)) +
  geom_dotplot(binwidth=2.5,         
               dotsize = 0.5) +      
  scale_y_continuous(NULL,           
                     breaks = NULL)  
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-2.png){width=672}
:::
:::


#### geom_histogram


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data=exam_data, 
       aes(x = MATHS)) +
  geom_histogram()       
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data=exam_data, 
       aes(x= MATHS)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=20,            
                 color="black",      
                 fill="light blue")  
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-2.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data=exam_data, 
       aes(x= MATHS, 
           fill = GENDER)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=20, 
                 color="grey30")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-3.png){width=672}
:::
:::
